title: Not able to force values on wires in positive edge of clock cycle

features.name: verilator public wire attribute for force access
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with /*verilator public*/ attribute to expose it for external force access from C++ testbench
features.snippet:
wire tst1/*verilator public*/;
wire tst2/*verilator public*/;

features.name: force assignment via public wire in always block
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clk) block where forced public wires are assigned to drive values

features.name: derived signal from forced public wires
features.description: Code should include a signal derived from multiple public wires where forced values should propagate
features.snippet:
assign tst3 = tst1 & tst2;
assign test_sig = tst3;
